# Summary

## Module

## What Changed

## Shared Code Touched

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run codex:preflight`
- [ ] `npm run codex:preflight:full` for release or high-risk changes
- [ ] Relevant manual or smoke test

## Checklist

- [ ] Module boundary is respected.
- [ ] Permissions are checked.
- [ ] Chinese, English, and Portuguese text are complete when UI text changed.
- [ ] Empty states, errors, table headers, status labels, exports, SOP/training content, and notifications are localized when touched.
- [ ] Any temporary single-language exception is explained.
- [ ] New capability is behind a feature flag.
- [ ] Events are versioned if events were added.
- [ ] Ledger-style records are used for money, points, stock, incentives, settlement, or game economy changes.
- [ ] Brand names are correct: MePonto and PontoSys.
